metadata.description: Baseline retrieval accuracy evaluation for the Samsung Smart TV documentation RAG system. Tests whether search_docs returns chunks that contain the terms needed to answer real developer questions.

question.prompt: How do I listen for remote control key events in a Samsung Smart TV web application?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: remote control key events Samsung TV web app

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: What are the required fields in the config.xml file for a Samsung Smart TV web application?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: config.xml required fields Samsung Smart TV

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: How does the Samsung Smart TV application lifecycle work? What events fire when the app is hidden or shown?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: Samsung TV web app lifecycle visibility events

question.scoring: pass if at least 2 of 3 must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: How should I implement focus management and spatial navigation for a Samsung TV web app so users can navigate with the remote?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: focus management spatial navigation Samsung TV remote

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: How do I play a video in a Samsung Smart TV web app? Which API or HTML element should I use?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: video playback API Samsung Smart TV web application

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: How can a Samsung TV web app detect whether the TV has an active internet connection?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: network connection check internet Samsung TV Tizen

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: What is the process for packaging a Samsung Smart TV web application for submission to the Samsung Smart Hub store?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: package Samsung Smart TV web app submission store wgt

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: What screen resolutions does Samsung Smart TV support for web applications, and how should I design my UI for different resolutions?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: Samsung TV resolution 1080p 4K UHD web app display

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: What options does a Samsung Smart TV web app have for storing data locally on the TV?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: local storage data persistence Samsung TV web app

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer

question.prompt: How do I set up the Tizen SDK emulator to test my Samsung Smart TV web application without a physical TV?

tool.name: search_docs
tool.suggested_query: Tizen SDK emulator setup Samsung TV development testing

question.scoring: pass if all must_contain terms appear in the final answer
